final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 9-grid cover image for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) personal media feed, featuring DJI Pocket 4 as the product hero, in the warm authenticity of amateur creator aesthetic.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu 9-grid cover design with the unpolished charm of personal creator content, hand-drawn typographic warmth
Composition: 9-grid layout (3x3), central grid reserved for main title, surrounding 8 grids showing product angles and lifestyle moments
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 handheld camera in various real-life usage scenarios — unboxing, outdoor vlogging, desk setup, travel moments, selfie recording
Scene/backdrop: everyday creator environments — cozy desk corner, cafe window light, outdoor park, bedroom aesthetic, authentic living spaces
Lighting/mood: the soft morning light of a creator's first unboxing, intimate and approachable
Color palette: warm cream and soft pastels with gentle contrast, the friendly palette of personal recommendation
Materials/textures: matte paper texture, subtle hand-drawn stroke quality, the tactile warmth of a personal notebook
Text (verbatim): 大强pocket4初体验
Constraints: 9-grid structure clearly visible, DJI Pocket 4 product recognizable in multiple grids, typography must be cute and differentiated (hand-drawn or rounded playful style), amateur creator aesthetic throughout
Avoid: professional studio polish, stock-photo perfection, generic sans-serif corporate fonts, over-saturated influencer gloss
